main.title: Employee Discount Program
main.ExceedLimit: Employee’s current spend has exceeded the annual limit. So, discount cannot be applied to the cart.
main.TryAgain: Something went wrong, Please try again!
main.EmployeeNotFound: Employee not found. Please have employee reach out to their manager/supervisor
main.DiscountSuspended: Employee discount is currently suspended. Please contact your Manager for more information.
main.StaffDifferent: Staff and Customer must be different
main.AddCustomer: Add customer and items to cart first
main.ManagerRequired: Manager or Lead required to complete transaction
main.VerifyPermission: Please wait, verifying user and permissions
main.EmployeeLookup: Please provide employee phone number to lookup
main.Name: Name
main.StaffIdMandatory: Staff Id is mandatory. Please reach out to manager
main.EmailUndefined: Staff Id is mandatory to find email, Email is undefined
main.ReviewEmail: is not found. Please review your email address in your employee profile
main.NotWorkEmail: is not a valid work email. Please request your Manager to correct it in your staff profile
